approach: Load real, textured .glb models using @react-three/drei useGLTF hook. All models are free and served uncompressed from public/models/.

context.current_behavior: Each detected object is rendered as a plain coloured sphere at position {x, y, z}.
context.desired_behavior: Replace every sphere with a real textured 3D model loaded from a .glb file.

step_1_download_models.description: Download these exact free models BEFORE writing any code. Place all .glb files in Dashboard_Service/public/models/

models.name: Walking Man (Mixamo character)
instructions: 1. Go to https://www.mixamo.com and sign in (free Adobe account)
2. In the Characters tab, select 'Y Bot' (clean, lightweight)
3. In the Animations tab, search for 'Walking' and select it
4. Click Download → Format: FBX for Unity → Skin: With Skin → Download
5. Open Blender (free: blender.org). File → Import → FBX. Select the downloaded file.
6. File → Export → glTF 2.0. Settings: Format=GLB, check 'Include: Selected Objects', check 'Geometry: Apply Modifiers', check 'Animation: NLA Strips'. Save as person.glb
models.alternative_if_no_blender: Download directly from https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/blob/dev/examples/models/gltf/Soldier.glb — this is the official Three.js soldier model, CC0, already GLB with walk animation. Copy as-is to public/models/person.glb

models.name: Stylised Low Poly Car (CC0)
models.author: Poly Elina (@poly_elina)
instructions: 1. Go to the URL above and click 'Download 3D Model'
2. Select format: GLTF — this gives you a .glb directly
models.alternative: Use the Three.js official car model at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrdoob/three.js/dev/examples/models/gltf/ferrari.glb

models.name: Low-Poly Motorcycle (CC0 / free use)
models.author: Sidra (@Sidramax)
instructions: 1. Go to the URL above and click Download
2. Select GLTF format. If only FBX/OBJ is available:
a. Open Blender → File → Import → FBX/OBJ
b. File → Export → glTF 2.0 → Format: GLB → Save as motorcycle.glb
models.alternative: Kenney.nl vehicle pack (CC0): https://kenney.nl/assets/car-kit — includes motorcycle variant, already optimised

step_2_install_dependencies.description: Install the one new package needed. Nothing else required.
step_2_install_dependencies.note: @react-three/fiber and three are assumed to already be installed in the project.

imports: import React, { useRef, useEffect, Suspense } from 'react'

PersonIcon_component.description: Loads the walking human GLB. Plays Walk animation on loop. Tinted yellow with accent emissive glow. Pulses faster on high confidence.

CarIcon_component.description: Loads car GLB. Applies green PBR paint override on body panels. Wheels rotate at idle speed.

MotorcycleIcon_component.description: Loads motorcycle GLB. Applies orange accent paint. Slight lean animation for visual interest.

LoadingFallback_component.description: Shown via Suspense while the GLB file is still downloading. Keeps the dashboard usable.

DetectionIcon_dispatcher.description: The ONLY component imported by TruckScene.jsx. Wraps each icon in Suspense with a spinner fallback.

changes: In the detection render loop, replace the sphere block with: detections.map((det, i) => <DetectionIcon key={i} detection={det} />)
Add <Suspense fallback={null}> wrapper around the detections map if not already present

step_4_performance_optimizations.description: Apply these for a smoother experience on your PC now, and they will also help later on Pi

optimizations.what: Call useGLTF.preload() for each model path at module level (outside components)
optimizations.why: Starts fetching the GLB while React is still mounting, eliminating waterfall loading

optimizations.what: Use React.useMemo(() => scene.clone(true), [scene]) instead of using scene directly
optimizations.why: Allows multiple instances of the same model (e.g. two cars detected simultaneously) without reloading the asset

optimizations.what: Set antialias: false on the Canvas gl prop
optimizations.why: Saves GPU resources; detection icons are small enough that aliasing is negligible
Caps devicePixelRatio to 1.5 to reduce GPU load
Keeps shadow quality reasonable without heavy memory cost

optimizations.what: Consider frameloop='demand' on Canvas if detections are infrequent
optimizations.why: Only re-renders when state changes — saves CPU/GPU when no objects are in blind spots
optimizations.tradeoff: Animations stop when no detections present; use frameloop='always' if you want idle animations

optimizations.what: In each icon component, return a cleanup function that calls useGLTF.clear('/models/X.glb') on unmount
optimizations.why: Prevents GPU memory leak over long sessions

step_5_lighting.description: Minimal lighting setup that makes GLB PBR materials look good

env_map.why: Warehouse HDRI gives realistic metal and glass reflections on PBR materials at very low cost

step_6_scale_calibration.description: GLB models from different sources have wildly different scale units. Calibrate each one after loading.
step_6_scale_calibration.method: Start with the scale values below, then visually adjust in the browser. The truck model bounding box is approximately 10 units long.

person.note: Mixamo/Three.js Soldier is ~170 units tall in native scale

car.note: Sketchfab low-poly car is typically ~2 units long natively

motorcycle.note: Adjust so motorcycle is roughly 60% the length of the car

step_6_scale_calibration.debug_tip: Temporarily add <axesHelper args={[2]} /> inside the group to see model origin and scale

file_structure_result.description: Final file layout after completing all steps

models/.person.glb: Mixamo Y Bot with walk animation

components/.DetectionIcon.jsx: NEW — PersonIcon + CarIcon + MotorcycleIcon + DetectionIcon dispatcher
components/.TruckScene.jsx: MODIFIED — replace sphere loop with <DetectionIcon detection={det} />

constraints: Use scene.clone(true) — never use the raw scene object directly or multi-instance rendering will break
Always wrap GLB-loading components in <Suspense> — GLB loading is async and will throw without it
Call useGLTF.preload() at module level for each model to avoid loading waterfalls
Do NOT modify WebSocket, Kafka consumer, or detection state logic
Color-coding must be preserved: person=#FFD700, car=#00FF88, motorcycle=#FF8C00
Confidence > 0.8 must trigger emissive pulse at 3-4 Hz on the model materials

troubleshooting.model_not_visible: Check scale — Mixamo models are often 100x too large. Start with scale={[0.01, 0.01, 0.01]}
troubleshooting.multiple_instances_broken: You forgot scene.clone(true) — raw scene is shared, cloning is mandatory for multiple detections
troubleshooting.animation_not_playing: Log Object.keys(actions) to see the exact animation clip names from your specific GLB file
troubleshooting.model_origin_offset: Some GLBs have their origin at wheel level or nose. Adjust the position prop or add an inner group with a y-offset.
